mapper.sql: id, spu_id, sku_code, spec_summary, sale_price_fen, inventory_mode, main_image_key, barcode, status, sort_order, version, deleted, deleted_at, deleted_by, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT sku.id AS "skuId", sku.sale_price_fen AS "priceFen", CASE WHEN sku.inventory_mode = 2 THEN 'in_stock' WHEN sku.inventory_mode = 1 AND coalesce(sum( CASE WHEN warehouse.id IS NOT NULL THEN greatest(stock.on_hand_quantity - stock.reserved_quantity, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) > #{lowStockThreshold} THEN 'in_stock' WHEN sku.inventory_mode = 1 AND coalesce(sum( CASE WHEN warehouse.id IS NOT NULL THEN greatest(stock.on_hand_quantity - stock.reserved_quantity, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) > 0 THEN 'low_stock' WHEN sku.inventory_mode = 1 THEN 'sold_out' ELSE NULL END AS "stock" FROM pinova.product_sku sku LEFT JOIN pinova.inventory_stock stock ON stock.sku_id = sku.id LEFT JOIN pinova.warehouse warehouse ON warehouse.id = stock.warehouse_id AND warehouse.status = 1 AND warehouse.deleted = false WHERE sku.spu_id = #{spuId} AND sku.status = 1 AND sku.deleted = false GROUP BY sku.id, sku.sale_price_fen, sku.inventory_mode, sku.sort_order ORDER BY sku.sort_order ASC, sku.id ASC
